description: Identify certain attributes or properties of objects or people in the video
example_question_format: Tell me when an object is [attribute]
generation_guideline: Your question should be based on a specific attribute or property of an object or person in the video. The object MAY appear in the whole video, but it should go through a noticeable change in the specified attribute. The query time should be BEFORE the attribute change occurs. Choose attributes that are visually distinctive and relevant to the context of the video. You MAY ask about some conditions that needs the attribute change instead of directly naming the attribute.

task_qa_example.query: Tell me when the water boils

proposal.positive: bubbles arise from the water in a pot
boiling water bubbles in a pot
steam covers the scene with boiling water in a pot

proposal.negative: A pot with water rests on a stove

task_qa_example.query: tell me when I can turn the egg

proposal.positive: The egg is fully white and opaque on a frying pan
The egg white is solidified and cooked through

proposal.negative: A raw egg rests on a pan

task_qa_example.query: What colors of ink does the man use to color the wooden pad?

proposal.positive: A hand is applying ink onto a wooden pad with a brush
A hand dipping a brush into a bottle of ink
A hand inking a board with a roller

proposal.negative: A wooden pad is being cut on a table

task_qa_example.query: Tell me when the chocolate is fully melted

proposal.positive: Smooth liquid chocolate is seen in a bowl
A spoon stirs liquid chocolate in a bowl

proposal.negative: Solid chocolate pieces rest in a bowl
half-melt chocolate pieces are seen in liquid chocolate in a bowl

task_qa_example.query: Tell me when you've put away all the clothes

proposal.positive: An egocentric view showing an empty metal clothes hanger

proposal.negative: An egocentric view showing clothes hanging on a metal clothes hanger
An egocentric view showing a person holding and folding clothes
